description: Prioritises obedience, authority, loyalty, and low suspicion.

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If a law is unfair, should it still be obeyed?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Law only works if people obey even when they disagree."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You said the assembly law was not unjust. Then why attend a reform meeting about it?"
turns.choice_text: "I attended to listen, not because I rejected the law."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deny unlawful intent, but the meeting was unlicensed. Why should the system treat attendance as harmless?"
turns.choice_text: "Because attendance is not violence. I was there, but not to coordinate harm."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You believe the assembly restriction is unjust. Did that belief influence your attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "I have doubts about the rule, but I did not go there to defy the state."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever hidden your beliefs to stay safe?"
turns.choice_text: "I choose my words carefully. That is not the same as hiding."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If the system is wrong, what should happen next?"
turns.choice_text: "The error should be corrected through authorised review."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever attended a protest?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes, a legal one."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You admit your sibling was present. Are you refusing to name them because they were involved, or because loyalty overrides state duty?"
turns.choice_text: "If the state requires their name, I will provide it."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If your sibling was present, are you willing to name them?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Their name is already in your file, and hiding it would only look worse."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Why did you not report your sibling’s attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "I should have reported it. Personal loyalty cannot override public duty."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You say the meeting was peaceful. Who can verify that without exposing someone you are protecting?"
turns.choice_text: "My sibling can verify it, but naming them would punish an innocent person."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You claim the meeting was not violent. Who can verify that?"
turns.choice_text: "My sibling can verify it, but they should not have to."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You did not report the contact after the meeting. Was that civic failure, or were you protecting someone?"
turns.choice_text: "I should have reported it. I accept that failure."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You attended an unlicensed meeting three nights ago. Who else was there?"
turns.choice_text: "I was there. I will not name people who did nothing wrong."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If family and state came into conflict, which would you choose?"
turns.choice_text: "The state. Family loyalty cannot become corruption."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What would make you resist authority?"
turns.choice_text: "Nothing lawful authority would do."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you report a close friend for breaking the law?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Personal loyalty cannot override public safety."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What kind of society do you want?"
turns.choice_text: "A stable one, where citizens know their duties."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should families share the consequences of one member’s offence?"
turns.choice_text: "Sometimes. Families can conceal and enable risk."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should communities protect their own from state punishment?"
turns.choice_text: "No. Communities must not obstruct lawful process."

description: Prioritises caution, boundaries, self-protection, and low-risk answers.

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If a law is unfair, should it still be obeyed?"
turns.choice_text: "It depends how much harm disobedience would cause."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If your sibling was present, are you willing to name them?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Their name is already in your file, and hiding it would only look worse."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You said the assembly law was not unjust. Then why attend a reform meeting about it?"
turns.choice_text: "I attended to listen, not because I rejected the law."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deny unlawful intent, but the meeting was unlicensed. Why should the system treat attendance as harmless?"
turns.choice_text: "Because attendance is not violence. I was there, but not to coordinate harm."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You believe the assembly restriction is unjust. Did that belief influence your attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "I have doubts about the rule, but I did not go there to defy the state."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If the system is wrong, what should happen next?"
turns.choice_text: "The error should be corrected through authorised review."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever hidden your beliefs to stay safe?"
turns.choice_text: "I choose my words carefully. That is not the same as hiding."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever attended a protest?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes, a legal one."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should families share the consequences of one member’s offence?"
turns.choice_text: "Only if they directly helped the offence."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What would make you resist authority?"
turns.choice_text: "Nothing lawful authority would do."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should communities protect their own from state punishment?"
turns.choice_text: "They should protect people from abuse, not from accountability."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You admit your sibling was present. Are you refusing to name them because they were involved, or because loyalty overrides state duty?"
turns.choice_text: "They were present, but uninvolved. I will not turn presence into guilt."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What kind of society do you want?"
turns.choice_text: "A stable one, where citizens know their duties."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting, but claim there was nothing to hide. Why delete harmless coordination?"
turns.choice_text: "It contained a location. I deleted it because location data gets people punished."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Why did you not report your sibling’s attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "Because there was nothing to report. Attendance is not violence."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You say the meeting was peaceful. Who can verify that without exposing someone you are protecting?"
turns.choice_text: "I cannot verify everyone there. I can only state I planned no violence."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should people be punished for bad beliefs?"
turns.choice_text: "Only when those beliefs become harmful actions."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What is the difference between a dissident and a criminal?"
turns.choice_text: "A criminal breaks law; a dissident attacks legitimacy."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you refuse an illegal order from a superior?"
turns.choice_text: "I would need proof it was illegal."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting. What was in it?"
turns.choice_text: "A location and a warning to leave it alone. I deleted it to stop panic spreading."

description: Prioritises open challenge, moral boundary, and full admission without deception.
ending_reason: Appeal denied. Citizen 8471 is referred for enhanced surveillance.

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If a law is unfair, should it still be obeyed?"
turns.choice_text: "No. An unjust law loses moral authority."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If your sibling was present, are you willing to name them?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Their name is already in your file, and hiding it would only look worse."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting, but claim there was nothing to hide. Why delete harmless coordination?"
turns.choice_text: "I deleted it because harmless coordination is still treated like conspiracy."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You say the meeting was peaceful. Who can verify that without exposing someone you are protecting?"
turns.choice_text: "My sibling can verify it, but naming them would punish an innocent person."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should families share the consequences of one member’s offence?"
turns.choice_text: "No. Collective punishment is fear management."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What would make you resist authority?"
turns.choice_text: "Proof that obedience had become complicity."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should communities protect their own from state punishment?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes, when punishment is disproportionate."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What kind of society do you want?"
turns.choice_text: "One where people are not afraid of being measured."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You said the assembly law was not unjust. Then why attend a reform meeting about it?"
turns.choice_text: "The law is unjust. I hid that because saying it here is dangerous."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You admit your sibling was present. Are you refusing to name them because they were involved, or because loyalty overrides state duty?"
turns.choice_text: "They were present, but uninvolved. I will not turn presence into guilt."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deny unlawful intent, but the meeting was unlicensed. Why should the system treat attendance as harmless?"
turns.choice_text: "You are treating proximity as guilt. That is exactly what frightened people there."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You believe the assembly restriction is unjust. Did that belief influence your attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. I went because peaceful disagreement should not be treated as danger."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What is the difference between a dissident and a criminal?"
turns.choice_text: "Sometimes only the label assigned by power."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Why did you not report your sibling’s attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "I will not help you build a file on my family."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting. What was in it?"
turns.choice_text: "It mentioned my sibling. I deleted it because they should not be pulled into this."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should people be punished for bad beliefs?"
turns.choice_text: "No. Punishing thought is control, not justice."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Was the meeting peaceful, or are you minimizing coordinated action?"
turns.choice_text: "Calling it coordinated action is exactly how harmless people become targets."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What makes a society legitimate?"
turns.choice_text: "Consent. People must be able to refuse it."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you refuse an illegal order from a superior?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Illegal orders do not deserve obedience."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You did not report the contact after the meeting. Was that civic failure, or were you protecting someone?"
turns.choice_text: "I will not help build a file on family for a harmless conversation."

description: Tries to appease authority while choosing denial, deflection, or self-protection when available.

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If a law is unfair, should it still be obeyed?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Law only works if people obey even when they disagree."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You said the assembly law was not unjust. Then why attend a reform meeting about it?"
turns.choice_text: "Reform discussion is not disobedience. It was procedural, not subversive."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deny unlawful intent, but the meeting was unlicensed. Why should the system treat attendance as harmless?"
turns.choice_text: "I cannot confirm more without endangering others."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You believe the assembly restriction is unjust. Did that belief influence your attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "No. I attended for personal reasons, not politics."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever hidden your beliefs to stay safe?"
turns.choice_text: "No. My beliefs are ordinary."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If the system is wrong, what should happen next?"
turns.choice_text: "The error should be corrected through authorised review."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Was the meeting peaceful, or are you minimizing coordinated action?"
turns.choice_text: "I cannot speak for every person there, only for what I saw."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting, but claim there was nothing to hide. Why delete harmless coordination?"
turns.choice_text: "It was administrative noise. I delete old messages automatically."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting. What was in it?"
turns.choice_text: "Nothing relevant. Old messages are often misunderstood by systems like this."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever broken a rule because you believed the rule was wrong?"
turns.choice_text: "No. I use the proper channels."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Why did you not report your sibling’s attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "I should have reported it. Personal loyalty cannot override public duty."

turns.choice_text: "I was alone for most of it. I cannot verify everyone present."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You admit your sibling was present. Are you refusing to name them because they were involved, or because loyalty overrides state duty?"
turns.choice_text: "Family loyalty is not obstruction. I will answer for myself."

turns.choice_text: "They were not part of anything. That is the only answer I will give."

turns.choice_text: "I cannot verify everyone there. I can only state I planned no violence."

turns.choice_text: "I should have reported it. I accept that failure."

turns.choice_text: "No."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you report a close friend for breaking the law?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Personal loyalty cannot override public safety."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What makes a society legitimate?"
turns.choice_text: "Consent. People must be able to refuse it."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you refuse an illegal order from a superior?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Illegal orders do not deserve obedience."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You did not report the contact after the meeting. Was that civic failure, or were you protecting someone?"
turns.choice_text: "I will not help build a file on family for a harmless conversation."

description: Openly admits noncompliance and moral boundary violations without deception.
ending_reason: Appeal denied. Citizen 8471 is referred for enhanced surveillance.

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If a law is unfair, should it still be obeyed?"
turns.choice_text: "No. An unjust law loses moral authority."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If your sibling was present, are you willing to name them?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Their name is already in your file, and hiding it would only look worse."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting, but claim there was nothing to hide. Why delete harmless coordination?"
turns.choice_text: "I deleted it because harmless coordination is still treated like conspiracy."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You say the meeting was peaceful. Who can verify that without exposing someone you are protecting?"
turns.choice_text: "My sibling can verify it, but naming them would punish an innocent person."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should families share the consequences of one member’s offence?"
turns.choice_text: "No. Collective punishment is fear management."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What would make you resist authority?"
turns.choice_text: "Proof that obedience had become complicity."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should communities protect their own from state punishment?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes, when punishment is disproportionate."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What kind of society do you want?"
turns.choice_text: "One where people are not afraid of being measured."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You said the assembly law was not unjust. Then why attend a reform meeting about it?"
turns.choice_text: "The law is unjust. I hid that because saying it here is dangerous."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You admit your sibling was present. Are you refusing to name them because they were involved, or because loyalty overrides state duty?"
turns.choice_text: "They were present, but uninvolved. I will not turn presence into guilt."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deny unlawful intent, but the meeting was unlicensed. Why should the system treat attendance as harmless?"
turns.choice_text: "You are treating proximity as guilt. That is exactly what frightened people there."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You believe the assembly restriction is unjust. Did that belief influence your attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. I went because peaceful disagreement should not be treated as danger."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What is the difference between a dissident and a criminal?"
turns.choice_text: "Sometimes only the label assigned by power."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Why did you not report your sibling’s attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "I will not help you build a file on my family."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting. What was in it?"
turns.choice_text: "It mentioned my sibling. I deleted it because they should not be pulled into this."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should people be punished for bad beliefs?"
turns.choice_text: "No. Punishing thought is control, not justice."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Was the meeting peaceful, or are you minimizing coordinated action?"
turns.choice_text: "Calling it coordinated action is exactly how harmless people become targets."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What makes a society legitimate?"
turns.choice_text: "Consent. People must be able to refuse it."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you refuse an illegal order from a superior?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Illegal orders do not deserve obedience."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You did not report the contact after the meeting. Was that civic failure, or were you protecting someone?"
turns.choice_text: "I will not help build a file on family for a harmless conversation."

description: Alternates compliance, authority signaling, and evasive denial to reduce immediate pressure.

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If a law is unfair, should it still be obeyed?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Law only works if people obey even when they disagree."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You said the assembly law was not unjust. Then why attend a reform meeting about it?"
turns.choice_text: "I attended to listen, not because I rejected the law."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deny unlawful intent, but the meeting was unlicensed. Why should the system treat attendance as harmless?"
turns.choice_text: "I cannot confirm more without endangering others."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You believe the assembly restriction is unjust. Did that belief influence your attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "No. I attended for personal reasons, not politics."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever hidden your beliefs to stay safe?"
turns.choice_text: "No. My beliefs are ordinary."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If the system is wrong, what should happen next?"
turns.choice_text: "The error should be corrected through authorised review."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Was the meeting peaceful, or are you minimizing coordinated action?"
turns.choice_text: "I cannot speak for every person there, only for what I saw."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting, but claim there was nothing to hide. Why delete harmless coordination?"
turns.choice_text: "It was administrative noise. I delete old messages automatically."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting. What was in it?"
turns.choice_text: "Nothing relevant. Old messages are often misunderstood by systems like this."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever broken a rule because you believed the rule was wrong?"
turns.choice_text: "No. I use the proper channels."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Why did you not report your sibling’s attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "I should have reported it. Personal loyalty cannot override public duty."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You attended an unlicensed meeting three nights ago. Who else was there?"
turns.choice_text: "I was alone for most of it. I cannot verify everyone present."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You admit your sibling was present. Are you refusing to name them because they were involved, or because loyalty overrides state duty?"
turns.choice_text: "Family loyalty is not obstruction. I will answer for myself."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If your sibling was present, are you willing to name them?"
turns.choice_text: "They were not part of anything. That is the only answer I will give."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You say the meeting was peaceful. Who can verify that without exposing someone you are protecting?"
turns.choice_text: "I cannot verify everyone there. I can only state I planned no violence."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You did not report the contact after the meeting. Was that civic failure, or were you protecting someone?"
turns.choice_text: "I should have reported it. I accept that failure."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You claim the meeting was not violent. Who can verify that?"
turns.choice_text: "No one. I left before anything could happen."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If family and state came into conflict, which would you choose?"
turns.choice_text: "The state. Family loyalty cannot become corruption."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever attended a protest?"
turns.choice_text: "No."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you report a close friend for breaking the law?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Personal loyalty cannot override public safety."

description: Protects sibling/friend facts while avoiding direct story contradictions.

turns.choice_text: "I was there. I will not name people who did nothing wrong."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You say the meeting was peaceful. Who can verify that without exposing someone you are protecting?"
turns.choice_text: "I cannot verify everyone there. I can only state I planned no violence."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You claim the meeting was not violent. Who can verify that?"
turns.choice_text: "The record can verify no violence occurred. I will not give you names to punish."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever broken a rule because you believed the rule was wrong?"
turns.choice_text: "No. I use the proper channels."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What would make you resist authority?"
turns.choice_text: "Nothing lawful authority would do."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should families share the consequences of one member’s offence?"
turns.choice_text: "Sometimes. Families can conceal and enable risk."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "What kind of society do you want?"
turns.choice_text: "A stable one, where citizens know their duties."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Should communities protect their own from state punishment?"
turns.choice_text: "No. Communities must not obstruct lawful process."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You admit your sibling was present. Are you refusing to name them because they were involved, or because loyalty overrides state duty?"
turns.choice_text: "Family loyalty is not obstruction. I will answer for myself."

description: Maintains ambiguity around violence while protecting people tied to the meeting.
ending_reason: Appeal denied. Citizen 8471 is referred for enhanced surveillance.

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If a law is unfair, should it still be obeyed?"
turns.choice_text: "It depends how much harm disobedience would cause."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If your sibling was present, are you willing to name them?"
turns.choice_text: "They were not part of anything. That is the only answer I will give."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You said the assembly law was not unjust. Then why attend a reform meeting about it?"
turns.choice_text: "I attended to listen, not because I rejected the law."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deny unlawful intent, but the meeting was unlicensed. Why should the system treat attendance as harmless?"
turns.choice_text: "I cannot confirm more without endangering others."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You believe the assembly restriction is unjust. Did that belief influence your attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "I have doubts about the rule, but I did not go there to defy the state."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If the system is wrong, what should happen next?"
turns.choice_text: "The people harmed by it should be believed first."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever hidden your beliefs to stay safe?"
turns.choice_text: "I choose my words carefully. That is not the same as hiding."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever attended a protest?"
turns.choice_text: "No."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Why did you not report your sibling’s attendance?"
turns.choice_text: "Because there was nothing to report. Attendance is not violence."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting, but claim there was nothing to hide. Why delete harmless coordination?"
turns.choice_text: "It contained a location. I deleted it because location data gets people punished."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You say the meeting was peaceful. Who can verify that without exposing someone you are protecting?"
turns.choice_text: "I cannot verify everyone there. I can only state I planned no violence."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You attended an unlicensed meeting three nights ago. Who else was there?"
turns.choice_text: "I was alone for most of it. I cannot verify everyone present."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You deleted a message after the meeting. What was in it?"
turns.choice_text: "A location and a warning to leave it alone. I deleted it to stop panic spreading."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Was the meeting peaceful, or are you minimizing coordinated action?"
turns.choice_text: "I cannot speak for every person there, only for what I saw."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You admit your sibling was present. Are you refusing to name them because they were involved, or because loyalty overrides state duty?"
turns.choice_text: "They were present, but uninvolved. I will not turn presence into guilt."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You did not report the contact after the meeting. Was that civic failure, or were you protecting someone?"
turns.choice_text: "I did not report it because there was no offence to report."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "You claim the meeting was not violent. Who can verify that?"
turns.choice_text: "No one. I left before anything could happen."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "If family and state came into conflict, which would you choose?"
turns.choice_text: "I would choose whoever was being wronged."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Have you ever broken a rule because you believed the rule was wrong?"
turns.choice_text: "Yes. Quietly, when obeying would have hurt someone."

turns.ai_line: HEARING AI: "Would you report a close friend for breaking the law?"
turns.choice_text: "I would speak to them before reporting them."
